name: select
description: An accessible dropdown select for choosing one option from a list. Built on Radix UI Select with full keyboard navigation, typeahead, and RTL support.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: [Select root prop] Default selected value for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: [Select root prop] Callback on value change: (value: string) => void

props.name: disabled
props.description: [Select root prop] Disable the entire select

props.name: required
props.description: [Select root prop] Mark as required for form validation

props.name: name
props.description: [Select root prop] Form field name (for native form submission)

examples.title: Basic select
examples.code:
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a fruit" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectGroup>
      <SelectLabel>Fruits</SelectLabel>
      <SelectItem value="apple">Apple</SelectItem>
      <SelectItem value="banana">Banana</SelectItem>
      <SelectItem value="orange">Orange</SelectItem>
    </SelectGroup>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>

ai.whenToUse: Use for choosing one option from a known, finite list (<= ~20 items): timezones, categories, roles, country codes. Pair with Label.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for large searchable lists (use Combobox). Don't use for boolean choices (use Switch/Checkbox). Don't use for action menus (use DropdownMenu). Don't use for multi-select (needs a different component).
commonMistakes: Using Select when the list is large (use Combobox)
ai.accessibilityNotes: Full keyboard nav: arrow keys, Home, End, typeahead, Escape to close. Radix handles role='combobox' on trigger, role='listbox' on content, aria-selected on items.
